message:
Update issue tracking and format markdown import tests

**Updated: .beads/issues.jsonl**
- Sync project issue tracking state with current work

**Updated: src/util/markdown_import.rs**
- Convert remaining raw string literals in tests from r#""# to r""
- Applies consistent formatting across all test cases
- Affects test functions:
  - test_labels_comma_separated
  - test_labels_whitespace_separated
  - test_dependencies_parsing
  - test_acceptance_criteria_alias
  - test_unknown_sections_ignored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
